name: nexmora-chat
description: Nexmora Chat App — Portfolio-grade real-time chat system

scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && npx tsx watch src/index.ts
scripts.dev:ws: cd websocket && npx tsx watch src/index.ts
scripts.dev-all: concurrently -n frontend,backend,websocket -c cyan,yellow,magenta "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:ws"
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ../websocket && npm install
